title: Smoky Lamb Stew
description: A hearty, comforting stew featuring tender lamb and a rich, smoky flavor.
instructions: Season lamb shoulder with salt and pepper.
In a large Dutch oven, heat 2 tablespoons of oil over medium-high heat. Sear lamb shoulder until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes. Remove lamb from pot and set aside.
Add remaining oil to pot, then sauté onion and garlic until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add smoked paprika, tomato paste, and red wine to pot. Stir to combine, then bring mixture to a simmer.
Return lamb shoulder to pot, then add beef broth. Cover pot with lid and transfer to preheated oven.
Braise lamb in oven for 2 1/2 hours, or until tender.
Remove pot from oven and stir in Greek yogurt. Let stew rest for 10 minutes before serving.
Garnish with chopped parsley before serving.
